content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To : File                                                Date : June 15, 1979

From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Regina Siciliano-Kutchins

Subject: Telephone advice to Bill Cline, Assemblyman Bane's Office

Cline called to ask if there was anyway to combine a report
due in connection with a contribution made in a special election
which is due June 21 with the semi-annual statement.

I informed him that the semi-annual campaign statement could be
filed early and if sent to the jurisdiction where the abbrevi-
ated statement is due in connection with the special election
would be deemed a timely filing for that election. An amend-
ment to the semi-annual statement would be required, however, if
there is additional activity after the closing date of the
semi-annual statement filed early.

Regulation 18426
Section 84206
Section 84204.1

sections.question_synthetic: Whether a campaign finance report due for a special election contribution can be combined with or satisfied by an early-filed semi-annual campaign statement.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The semi-annual campaign statement can be filed early and, if sent to the jurisdiction requiring the abbreviated statement for the special election, will satisfy that filing requirement. However, an amendment to the early-filed semi-annual statement is required if additional campaign activity occurs after its closing date.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Internal FPPC memorandum documenting telephone advice. No formal question/conclusion sections, but clear advisory content. Advice provided by Regina Siciliano-Kutchins to staff in Assemblyman Bane's office regarding campaign finance reporting requirements.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether a campaign finance report due for a special election contribution can be combined with or satisfied by an early-filed semi-annual campaign statement.

CONCLUSION: The semi-annual campaign statement can be filed early and, if sent to the jurisdiction requiring the abbreviated statement for the special election, will satisfy that filing requirement. However, an amendment to the early-filed semi-annual statement is required if additional campaign activity occurs after its closing date.
embedding.first_500_words: State of California Memorandum To : File Date : June 15, 1979 From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION Regina Siciliano-Kutchins Subject: Telephone advice to Bill Cline, Assemblyman Bane's Office Cline called to ask if there was anyway to combine a report due in connection with a contribution made in a special election which is due June 21 with the semi-annual statement. I informed him that the semi-annual campaign statement could be filed early and if sent to the jurisdiction where the abbrevi- ated statement is due in connection with the special election would be deemed a timely filing for that election. An amend- ment to the semi-annual statement would be required, however, if there is additional activity after the closing date of the semi-annual statement filed early. Regulation 18426 Section 84206 Section 84204.1
embedding.summary: FPPC advises that an early semi-annual campaign statement can serve as the required contribution report for a special election, provided it is filed with the appropriate jurisdiction and amended if necessary for subsequent activity.
